title: 222 Blu ray Question
wikitext:
[]: 2.22 Blu-ray Question             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Fri Sep 25, 2015 3:31 pm Now that I finally have a blu-ray player, I'm looking to upgrade my dvds of 1.01 and 2.22 to the blu-ray editions. Are there any differences content-wise between the blu-ray with Mari on the cover and the one with the orange slip case? The stores I've checked are painfully unclear about it!

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Fri Sep 25, 2015 5:11 pm For the films, and the video/audio quality, there is no difference whatsoever.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Fri Sep 25, 2015 5:11 pm As far as I can tell, no. In fact, the Mari cover is what's on the box inside the slip case anyway.

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Fri Sep 25, 2015 5:16 pm However, 1.11 will be a clear upgrade from 1.01.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Fri Sep 25, 2015 5:18 pm pwhodges wrote: However, 1.11 will be a clear upgrade from 1.01.

[]:             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Fri Sep 25, 2015 5:34 pm pwhodges wrote: However, 1.11 will be a clear upgrade from 1.01.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Fri Sep 25, 2015 6:51 pm Getting the BDs is a fantastic idea. Like others have said, it doesn't really matter which one you get unless you have a hankering for one particular cover.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Sep 25, 2015 7:07 pm It was the first press of Funimation's 1.11 that had some trailers (Fly Me to the Moon 1.0 & 2.0) which were later removed due to supposed rights issues. Funi's 2.22 and 1.11 didn't have any changes otherwise besides no slipcovers in later reprints.
